description: SN2 naming lint config (AlembicAgent, ported from the SN1 Dashboard shape). Codifies the SN0 §1 dominant conventions as per-artifact-type filename patterns: src code modules camelCase (helpers/toolkits) or PascalCase (class/contract/model positions) with kebab/snake forbidden; index.ts barrels allowed everywhere (dominant idiom); scripts and configs kebab-case. The repo's codified DELIBERATE family is x.profile.ts (SN0 §1 exempt family, encoded in the src namePattern); ambient .d.ts declarations are allowed. test/ filenames are outside the SN0 §2 Agent census (mixed PascalCase/kebab as-found) and stay unscoped until an SN wave censuses them. Exceptions require {file, owner, reason}; entries missing a field do not exempt.

rules.label: src modules are camelCase or PascalCase (no kebab/snake); x.profile.ts is the codified deliberate family
